category_sources: source_facts.description says pktanon performs packet trace anonymization; the official KIT page describes PktAnon as packet trace anonymization.
display_name_sources: Official KIT documentation page uses the display name PktAnon.
docs_sources: Official KIT PktAnon documentation page links the manual and source-code documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official KIT PktAnon pages provide documentation and source downloads but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official KIT documentation describe anonymizing packet traces and supported network protocols.
